
### control hazard  {.smaller}


```
0x00: cmpq %r8, %r9
0x08: je   0xFFFF
0x10: addq %r10, %r11

```
 

::: {.r-stack}
![](/pipeline/texfig/controlHazard.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/pipeline/texfig/controlHazard.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}


:::
